name: Iso11783IL_TIMLoadLwATable
title: Iso11783IL_TIMLoadLwATable
description: Loads a table with lightweight authentication (LwA) keys from a file.
The LwA table has to be stored with function Iso11783IL_TIMSaveLwATable before.

parameters.name: iniFilePath
parameters.description: Path of a file (INI file format) which contains the LwA key table of the TIM client/server. Path has to be absolute or relative relating to the folder of the CANoe configuration.
